name: Custodian Guard With Adrasite And Pyrithite Spears

datasheet.text: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1. While this unit is within range of an objective marker you control, you can re-roll the Wound roll instead.
datasheet.name: Stand Vigil

datasheet.text: Once per battle, at the start of your Shooting phase , this unit can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [LETHAL HITS] and [IGNORES COVER] abilities.
datasheet.name: No Foe Shall Stand

items: 5 Custodian Guard with Adrasite and Pyrithite Spears

keywords: CUSTODIAN GUARD WITH ADRASITE AND PYRITHITE SPEARS

entries.label: Any number of models can each have their adrasite spear replaced with 1 pyrithite spear.

entries.text: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1. While this unit is within range of an objective marker you control, you can re-roll the Wound roll instead.
entries.name: Stand Vigil

entries.text: Once per battle, at the start of your Shooting phase , this unit can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [LETHAL HITS] and [IGNORES COVER] abilities.
entries.name: No Foe Shall Stand

items: 5 Custodian Guard with Adrasite and Pyrithite Spears

entries.text: If an ADEPTUS CUSTODES model from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to a CUSTODIAN GUARD unit, it can be attached to this unit instead.
